title: 5 Ways to Create Better Invoices That Get Paid Faster
excerpt: Small wording and layout changes can shave days off your average payment time. Here's what actually moves the needle.
content:
## Why invoice design matters

A clear invoice is the difference between getting paid in 7 days or 47. Below are the five changes our team recommends to every Billinox user.

### 1. Lead with the total

Clients scan, they don't read. Put the **total amount due** and **due date** at the top of the document — not buried at the bottom.

### 2. Use plain-English line items

Replace `SVC-002` with `Brand strategy session — 2 hrs`. Specificity reduces back-and-forth.

### 3. Offer two payment methods

Bank transfer plus a card link covers 95% of clients. More than two creates decision paralysis.

### 4. Send a friendly nudge at day 7

Most late payments are forgotten, not refused. A short reminder recovers most of them.

### 5. Always include your terms

> Net 14. Late payments incur a 2% monthly fee.

That single sentence anchors expectations from day one.

## Wrap-up

These aren't tricks — they're hygiene. Apply them consistently and watch your DSO drop within a quarter.
author: Billinox Team
